name: Ain Mutaqorrobin
tagline: I build web and mobile products with a strong focus on maintainability, delivery speed, and clean engineering workflows.
heroSummary: I enjoy building practical products, improving developer workflows, and turning ideas into production-ready systems with modern JavaScript and TypeScript stacks.
availability: Open to freelance projects, software roles, and technical collaborations.
about: I am a software engineer with around three years of experience building and maintaining applications across web and mobile platforms.
My work covers frontend development, backend services, debugging, maintenance, and shipping features that are practical for real users and teams.
Lately I have been going deeper into microservices and DevOps, especially Docker and Kubernetes, to strengthen how I design, package, and deploy production systems.

workExperience.summary: Working across backend, frontend, and mobile application development.
highlights: Build and maintain scalable web and mobile applications.
Manage and scale containerized environments for reliable deployments.
Lead and coordinate mobile development teams to deliver projects efficiently.

workExperience.summary: Built web applications using Next.js and TypeScript in a product-focused team environment.
highlights: Connected backend and frontend systems using Axios, making sure different parts of the application work well together.
Used Swagger and Postman to check and document APIs, ensuring the website runs correctly.
Developed comprehensive utility functions and global CSS variables, enhancing code reusability and maintaining consistent design system across multiple modules.

workExperience.summary: Worked on enterprise web applications using Angular and TypeScript in a structured engineering environment.
highlights: Handled front-end development for web applications using TypeScript and the Angular framework.
Integrated REST APIs and connected business logic to the front-end application using Angular.
Resolved tickets and bugs raised by partners related to internal libraries and the company framework in GitLab.

workExperience.summary: Supported web development tasks and internal product work during my software engineering internship.
highlights: Contributed to web development tasks using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and TypeScript.
Worked on internal projects using React, TypeScript, CSS Modules, and GitHub.
Created documentation for an e-commerce website covering both front-end and back-end flows with Next.js and AWS Lambda.
